questions.question_text: A student scores 75, 80 and 90 in three tests with weights 2,3 and 5 respectively. What is the weighted average score?
The largest four-digit number which when divided by 7, 6 and 10 leaves the remainder 5 in each case, is:
Calculate the total amount when ₹4000 is invested at 10% compound interest per annum, compounded annually for 2 years.

Two taps can fill a cistern in 4 hours and 11 hours, respectively. A third tap can empty it in 11 hours. How long (in hours) will it take to fill one-fourth of the empty cistern if all the taps are opened together?
Find the single discount equivalent to three successive discounts of 10% on a commodity.
If $9x - 9^{x-1} = 72$, then the value of $ \frac{2x-1}{2x+3} $ is:

Two trains, X and Y are running on parallel tracks. Train X is 200 m long and travels at 72 km/hr. Train Y is 300 m long. If the trains are travelling in opposite directions, they cross each other completely in 15 seconds. If the trains are travelling in the same direction, how long would it take for the faster train to overtake the slower one?
The ages of two siblings add up to 44 years. If one sibling is 4 years younger than twice the other's age, what is the difference between their ages?

A shopkeeper marks an item at ₹4,000. During a festival, he first offers a discount of 25% on the marked price. After a week, he increases the discounted price by 20% to earn more profit. What is the final selling price of the item after these successive changes?
Simplify $10.5 - \left\{ 6.5 - \left( 3.3 - \left( 3.2 - 2.2 - 1.8 \right) \right) \right\}$
Four numbers a, b, c and d satisfy the relation $(a+b):(b+c):(c+d) = (d-4)$.If $a+b+c+d=12$, find the value of d.
If $\sin 6A = \cos 12A$, find the value of $\tan 9A + \cot 9A$.
A television is marked at ₹50,000. A retailer gives a 15% discount on the first 70% of the price and a 5% discount on the rest. What is the total percentage discount offered?

The curved surface area of a solid cylinder is numerically equal to the total surface area of another cylinder whose radius is half of the first cylinder. If the height and radius of the first cylinder are 7 cm and 4 cm, respectively, find the curved surface area of the second cylinder.
Which of the following digits should replace X so that the three-digit number 2X2 is divisible by 4?
A retailer buys 60 pens and sells them at the purchase price of 72 pens. Determine his profit percentage.
A transition code 92419 is not divisible by 13. To make it divisible by 13, the least digit should be appended at the end of the number. What is that digit?

ABCD is a quadrilateral in which AB $||$ DC, and E and F are the mid points of the diagonals AC and BD, respectively. If AB = 42 cm, BC = 91 cm, DC = 28 cm, and AD = 39 cm, then what is the length (in cm) of EF?
A train runs at 72 km/h for 3 hours and then at 60 km/h for 1.5 hours. What is the average speed of the train?
If the principal is ₹1000, the rate is 5% per annum, and the time is 2 years, what is the simple interest?
If 5 and 10 are given, what is the third proportional to these numbers?
Trains from Delhi, Lucknow, and Jaipur depart every 12 minutes, 18 minutes, and 27 minutes, respectively. If all depart together at 6:00 am, when will they depart together again?

The sum of two numbers is 72. If the larger number is increased by 8 and the smaller number is decreased by 6, then the resulting numbers are in the ratio 3 : 2, respectively. Find the smaller of the original two numbers.
If 40% of a number exceeds 25% of it by 36, then the number is:

A shopkeeper offers the following schemes on toys of the same marked price.(A) Successive discounts of 10% and 5% on any number of toys bought.(B) Successive discounts of 15%, 43% and 23% on any number of toys bought.(C) Discount of 10% on first 3 toys and 20% discount on each additional toy.(D) On buying ten items, the customer is billed for only seven items.A customer wants to buy 10 toys. Which of the above schemes is the least beneficial to her?
The average of k numbers is x. If 48 is subtracted from each of any two of the numbers, then we get (x-12) as the new average. Find the value of k.
The speeds of two cars are in the ratio 9 : 7. The faster car covers 140 km in 2 hours. How much distance will the slower car cover in the same time?

A tank is being filled by two taps, M and N. M fills the tank completely in 18 hours and N fills it in 9 hours. At the bottom of the tank, the tank is also emptied completely filled tank in 27 hours. How long will it take to fill the empty tank completely if both taps are opened while the leakage continues?
The diagonals of a rhombus-shaped field are 224 m and 420 m long. What is the perimeter (in m) of the field?
Which extremist leader authored the famous work, Gîta Rahasya?
Which launch vehicle will be used for Chandrayaan-3?
What does CD stand for in computer terminology?
In a cross between true-breeding red-flowered and true breeding white-flowered plants, the Filial 1 (F1) progeny was pink. This is a case of which type of inheritance?

options.text: The Chairman of the Rajya Sabha
The Speaker of the Lok Sabha

questions.question_text: The members of the Railway Convention Committee are nominated by which of the following authorities of India?

options.text: Drafting the Nehru Report outlining complete independence for India
Leading the anti-Simon Commission protests, where he suffered fatal injuries
Leading the Bardoli satyagraha against enhanced revenue-demand policies
Commanding the Congress Volunteers during the Salt March in Gujarat

questions.question_text: Which contribution is correctly associated with Lala Lajpat Rai during the freedom struggle?
Who among the following was associated with the Farazi Movement in Bengal during the 19th century?

ఎటువంటి మార్గదర్శకాలను విశ్లేషించాలి, CAA (పౌరసత్వ సవరణ చట్టం) 2019 బిల్లు ప్రకారం, డిసెంబర్ 31, 2014 ముందు ఆఫ్ఘనిస్తాన్, బంగ్లాదేశ్, పాకిస్తాన్ నుండి అక్రమ వలసదారులుగా భారతదేశంలోకి ప్రవేశించిన హిందువులు, సిక్కులు, బౌద్ధులు, జైనులు, పార్సీలు మరియు క్రైస్తవులకు భారత పౌరసత్వం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. ఇక్కడ ఏ దేశాలకు సంబంధించిన వారికి పౌరసత్వం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది?

options.text: Radial pattern spreading from a centre
Grid pattern intersecting at right angles

Which global event first initiated coordinated international action on environmental protection and development?

questions.question_text: భారతీయ రాజ్యాంగమల అభివృద్ధిలో ఏది పరిమితమెనుకోబడ్డది, ఈమధ్య మళ్లీ పునర్విమర్శించబడింది?
Where was the 69th session of the United Nations Commission on the Status of Women held in March 2025?

In October 2023, India's Society of Association Executives (SAE) officially launched in which of the following cities?

మహారాష్ట్రలో, పారశ్యుతలోని పూర్తిస్థాయిలోని విద్యావేత్తలచేత, ఎంతటి సంభావనలు ఉపయోగిస్తున్నారంటే ఏమిటి?

The S.I. derived unit for Force is the Newton (N). Which combination of S.I. base units is equivalent to the Newton?
குறைந்தபட்ச வேகம் என்பதின் அடிப்படையில் தன்னை உள்ளிழுப்பது, முக்கியமாக எந்த வகையான உராய்வு அதன் இயக்கத்தை எதிர்க்கிறது?

(NOTE: You have to take the given data to be true even if it seems to be at variance from commonly known facts.)How many such Teachers are there who are also Dentists but not Surgeons?

Each of the digits in the number 96872419 is arranged in the ascending order from left to right. What will be the sum of the digits which are second from the left and third from the right in the new number thus formed?

Which of the following letters will be third from the right in the new group of letters thus formed?

Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following set.(NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into their constituent digits. E.g., 13 - Operations on 13 such as adding/subtracting/multiplying to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.)(2, 7, 14)(3, 16, 48)
In a row of 22 students facing North, Sunil is 17th from the left end. If Deepak is 3rd to the right of Sunil, what is Deepak's position from the right end of the row?
In a row of 54 students facing the north, Gagan is 13th from the right end. If Nitin is 17th to the left of Gagan, what is Nitin's position from the left end of the line?

Refer to the following series and answer the question. (Counting to be done from left to right only.) (All numbers are single-digit numbers only) (Left) 4 1 2 6 1 4 7 8 1 9 4 3 4 5 4 2 3 4 7 6 (Right)How many such even digits are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a perfect square and immediately followed by an odd digit? (NOTE: 1 is also a perfect square.)
JDJIK is related to OI MP in a certain way, based on the English alphabetical order. In the same way, KGNMQ is related to SU PS. To which of the following is PQNQ related, following the same logic?

Which is the one that does not belong to that group?(Note: The position of the letter is based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

Seven people, N, V, C, Y, E, F and Q, are sitting in a row, facing north.Only two people sit to the right of F. N sits to the right of V. Exactly two people sit between N and V. E is the immediate neighbour of Q and V. Y does not sit to the right of C.How many people sit between Y and E?

Seven boxes, M, N, O, P, Q, R and S, are kept one over the other, but not necessarily in the same order.No box is kept above O. Only three boxes are kept between O and S. Only one box is kept between Q and R. R is kept immediately above S. Only four boxes are kept between Q and P. R is kept at some place above N.Which box is kept second below R?
In a certain code language, 'DONE' is coded as '5432' and 'CODE' is coded as '2835'. What is the code for 'C' in the given code language?

Read the given statements and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statements is true, even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements.Statements: All vehicles are machines. Some machines are tools.Conclusions:(I) Some vehicles are tools. (II) All tools are machines.

Rory starts from Point A and drives 16 km towards South. He then takes a right turn, drives 14 km, turns right and drives 24 km. He then takes a right turn and drives 2 km, turns right, drives 13 km. He then takes a left turn, drives 21 km. He takes a final right turn, drives 4 km and stops at Point P. How far (shortest distance) and towards which direction should he drive in order to reach Point A again?(All turns are 90 degrees turns only, unless specified.)
Each of the digits in the number 1358274 is arranged in the ascending order from left to right. In position of how many digits will remain unchanged as compared to that in the original number?

A, B, O, P, Q, T and Z are sitting around a circular table facing the center. Only two people sit between O and T when counted from the right of O. Z sits third to the right of B. A sits to the immediate right of B. A sits second to the left of O. Z is an immediate neighbour of J. How many people sit between O and Z when counted from the right of O?
